name: cbre
description: CBRE's Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude — branded decks, account briefings, property longlists, and on-brand writing.

plugins.description: The CBRE Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude. Build polished, on-brand PowerPoint decks, turn a folder of property materials into an interactive longlist dashboard, draft I&L account briefings, and keep every word in the CBRE tone of voice.
